problem id: 799c6822
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(7)) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11001111 -> 11100111
  01110000 -> 00111000
  10111100 -> 01011110
  11100111 -> 11110011
  10101001 -> 01010100
  00101101 -> 00010110
  11111111 -> 11111111

query: 11011100
predicted answer: 01101110
